absorb.short_effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
absorb.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
absorb.flavor_text: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

acid.name: acid
acid.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
acid.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
acid.flavor_text: Opposing Pokémon are attacked with a spray of harsh acid. This may also lower their Sp. Def stats.

acid-armor.name: acid-armor
acid-armor.short_effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.
acid-armor.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.
acid-armor.flavor_text: The user alters its cellular structure to liquefy itself, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

agility.name: agility
agility.short_effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.
agility.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.
agility.flavor_text: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply boosts its Speed stat.

air-cutter.name: air-cutter
air-cutter.short_effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
air-cutter.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
air-cutter.flavor_text: The user launches razor-like wind to slash opposing Pokémon. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

amnesia.name: amnesia
amnesia.short_effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by two stages.
amnesia.effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by two stages.
amnesia.flavor_text: The user temporarily empties its mind to forget its concerns. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Def stat.

aromatherapy.name: aromatherapy
aromatherapy.short_effect: Cures the entire party of major status effects.
aromatherapy.effect: Removes major status effects and confusion from every Pokémon in the user’s party.
aromatherapy.flavor_text: This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

astonish.name: astonish
astonish.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
astonish.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
astonish.flavor_text: The user attacks the target by crying out in a startling fashion. This may also make the target flinch.

attract.name: attract
attract.short_effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.
attract.effect: Causes the target to fall in love with the user, giving it a 50% chance to do nothing each turn. If the user and target are the same gender, or either is genderless, this move will fail. If either Pokémon leaves the field, this effect ends.
attract.flavor_text: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.

aurora-beam.name: aurora-beam
aurora-beam.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.
aurora-beam.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.
aurora-beam.flavor_text: The target is hit with a rainbow-colored beam. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

barrier.name: barrier
barrier.short_effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.
barrier.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.
barrier.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

baton-pass.name: baton-pass
baton-pass.short_effect: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.
baton-pass.effect: User switches out, and the trainer selects a replacement Pokémon from the party. Stat changes, confusion, and persistent move effects are passed along to the replacement Pokémon. The following move effects are passed: * aqua ring * both the user’s and target’s effect of block, mean look, and spider web * the curse effect of curse * embargo * focus energy or an activated lansat berry * gastro acid * ingrain * being sapped by leech seed * being targeted by lock on or mind reader * magnet rise * perish song’s counter * power trick * substitute; the doll’s HP is unchanged The replacement Pokémon does not trigger effects that respond to Pokémon switching in.
baton-pass.flavor_text: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.

beat-up.name: beat-up
beat-up.short_effect: Hits once for every conscious Pokémon the trainer has.
beat-up.effect: Inflicts typeless regular damage. Every Pokémon in the user’s party, excepting those that have fainted or have a major status effect, attacks the target. Calculated stats are ignored; the base stats for the target and assorted attackers are used instead. The random factor in the damage formula is not used. dark Pokémon still get STAB. This effect breaks through wonder guard.
beat-up.flavor_text: The user gets all party Pokémon to attack the target. The more party Pokémon, the greater the number of attacks.

belch.name: belch
belch.short_effect: Can only be used after the user has eaten a berry.
belch.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Can only be used if the user has eaten a berry since the beginning of the battle. After the user eats a berry, it may use this move any number of times until the end of the battle, even if it switches out. Eating a held berry, eating a berry via bug bite or pluck, or being the target of a Flung berry will enable this move. Feeding a Pokémon a berry from the bag or using natural gift will not. If the trainer chooses this move when it cannot be used, the choice is rejected outright and the trainer must choose another move.
belch.flavor_text: The user lets out a damaging belch at the target. The user must eat a held Berry to use this move.

belly-drum.name: belly-drum
belly-drum.short_effect: User pays half its max HP to max out its Attack.
belly-drum.effect: User pays half its max HP to raise its Attack to +6 stages. If the user cannot pay the HP cost, this move will fail.
belly-drum.flavor_text: The user maximizes its Attack stat but loses HP equal to half its max HP.

bide.name: bide
bide.short_effect: User waits for two turns, then hits back for twice the damage it took.
bide.effect: User waits for two turns. On the second turn, the user inflicts twice the damage it accumulated on the last Pokémon to hit it. Damage inflicted is typeless. This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
bide.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

bind.name: bind
bind.short_effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
bind.effect: Inflicts regular damage. For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn. The user continues to use other moves during this time. If the user leaves the field, this effect ends. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use. rapid spin cancels this effect.
bind.flavor_text: A long body, tentacles, or the like are used to bind and squeeze the target for four to five turns.

bite.name: bite
bite.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
bite.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
bite.flavor_text: The target is bitten with viciously sharp fangs. This may also make the target flinch.

blizzard.name: blizzard
blizzard.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.
blizzard.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target. During hail, this move has 100% accuracy. It also has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection of protect and detect.
blizzard.flavor_text: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokémon. This may also leave the opposing Pokémon frozen.

body-slam.name: body-slam
body-slam.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
body-slam.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
body-slam.flavor_text: The user attacks by dropping onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

bone-club.name: bone-club
bone-club.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
bone-club.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
bone-club.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

bounce.name: bounce
bounce.short_effect: User bounces high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
bounce.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User bounces high into the air for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn. Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target. During the immune turn, gust, hurricane, sky uppercut, smack down, thunder, and twister still hit the user normally. gust and twister also have double power against the user. The damage from hail and sandstorm still applies during the immune turn. The user may be hit during its immune turn if under the effect of lock on, mind reader, or no guard. This move cannot be used while gravity is in effect. This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
bounce.flavor_text: The user bounces up high on the first turn, then drops onto the target on the next turn. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

brick-break.name: brick-break
brick-break.effect: Destroys any light screen or reflect on the target’s side of the field, then inflicts regular damage.
brick-break.flavor_text: The user attacks with a swift chop. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

bubble.name: bubble
bubble.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
bubble.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
bubble.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

bubble-beam.name: bubble-beam
bubble-beam.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
bubble-beam.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
bubble-beam.flavor_text: A spray of bubbles is forcefully ejected at the target. This may also lower the target's Speed stat.

bug-bite.name: bug-bite
bug-bite.short_effect: If target has a berry, inflicts double damage and uses the berry.
bug-bite.effect: Inflicts regular damage. If the target is holding a berry, this move has double power, and the user takes the berry and uses it immediately. If the target is holding a jaboca berry or rowap berry, the berry is still removed, but has no effect. If this move is super effective and the target is holding a berry that can reduce this move’s damage, it will do so, and will not be stolen.
bug-bite.flavor_text: The user attacks by biting the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

bug-buzz.name: bug-buzz
bug-buzz.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
bug-buzz.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
bug-buzz.flavor_text: The user vibrates to generate a damaging sound wave. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

charge.name: charge
charge.short_effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by one stage. User’s Electric moves have doubled power next turn.
charge.effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by one stage. If the user uses an electric move next turn, its power will be doubled.
charge.flavor_text: The user becomes charged, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move it uses. This also boosts the user's Sp. Def stat.

charge-beam.name: charge-beam
charge-beam.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.
charge-beam.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.
charge-beam.flavor_text: The user attacks the target with an electric charge. The residual electricity may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.

charm.name: charm
charm.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by two stages.
charm.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by two stages.
charm.flavor_text: The user gazes at the target rather charmingly, making it less wary. This harshly lowers the target's Attack stat.

clamp.name: clamp
clamp.short_effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
clamp.effect: Inflicts regular damage. For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn. The user continues to use other moves during this time. If the user leaves the field, this effect ends. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use. rapid spin cancels this effect.
clamp.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

comet-punch.name: comet-punch
comet-punch.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Hits 2–5 times in one turn. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use.
comet-punch.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

confuse-ray.name: confuse-ray
confuse-ray.flavor_text: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that causes confusion.

confusion.name: confusion
confusion.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
confusion.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
confusion.flavor_text: The target is hit with a weak telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also confuse the target.

constrict.name: constrict
constrict.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
constrict.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
constrict.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

cosmic-power.name: cosmic-power
cosmic-power.short_effect: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
cosmic-power.effect: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
cosmic-power.flavor_text: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to boost its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

cotton-spore.name: cotton-spore
cotton-spore.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
cotton-spore.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
cotton-spore.flavor_text: The user releases cotton-like spores that cling to opposing Pokémon. This harshly lowers their Speed stats.

counter.name: counter
counter.short_effect: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last physical hit it took.
counter.effect: Targets the last opposing Pokémon to hit the user with a physical move this turn. Inflicts twice the damage that move did to the user. If there is no eligible target, this move will fail. Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored. This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome.
counter.flavor_text: A retaliatory attack that counters any physical move, inflicting double the damage taken.

crabhammer.name: crabhammer
crabhammer.short_effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
crabhammer.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
crabhammer.flavor_text: The target is hammered with a large pincer. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

crunch.name: crunch
crunch.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
crunch.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
crunch.flavor_text: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

curse.name: curse
curse.short_effect: Ghosts pay half their max HP to hurt the target every turn. Others decrease Speed but raise Attack and Defense.
curse.effect: If the user is a ghost: user pays half its max HP to place a curse on the target, damaging it for 1/4 its max HP every turn. Otherwise: Lowers the user’s Speed by one stage, and raises its Attack and Defense by one stage each. The curse effect is passed on by baton pass. This move cannot be copied by mirror move.
curse.flavor_text: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

cut.name: cut
cut.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
cut.flavor_text: The target is cut with a scythe or claw.

defense-curl.name: defense-curl
defense-curl.short_effect: Raises user’s Defense by one stage.
defense-curl.effect: Raises user’s Defense by one stage. After this move is used, the power of ice ball and rollout are doubled until the user leaves the field.
defense-curl.flavor_text: The user curls up and boosts its Defense stat.

destiny-bond.name: destiny-bond
destiny-bond.short_effect: If the user faints this turn, the target automatically will, too.
destiny-bond.effect: If the user faints before its next move, the Pokémon that fainted it will automatically faint. End-of-turn damage is ignored. This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
destiny-bond.flavor_text: If the user is knocked out after using this move, the Pokémon that knocked it out will also faint. This move's chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

detect.name: detect
detect.short_effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.
detect.effect: No moves will hit the user for the remainder of this turn. If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail. If the user successfully used detect, endure, protect, quick guard, or wide guard on the last turn, this move has a 50% chance to fail. lock on, mind reader, and no guard provide a (100 – accuracy)% chance for moves to break through this move. This does not apply to one-hit KO moves (fissure, guillotine, horn drill, and sheer cold); those are always blocked by this move. thunder during rain dance and blizzard during hail have a 30% chance to break through this move. The following effects are not prevented by this move: * acupressure from an ally * curse’s curse effect * Delayed damage from doom desire and future sight; however, these moves will be prevented if they are used this turn * feint, which will also end this move’s protection after it hits * imprison * perish song * shadow force * Moves that merely copy the user, such as transform or psych up This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
detect.flavor_text: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

dig.name: dig
dig.short_effect: User digs underground, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
dig.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User digs underground for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn. During the immune turn, earthquake, fissure, and magnitude still hit the user normally, and their power is doubled if appropriate. The user may be hit during its immune turn if under the effect of lock on, mind reader, or no guard. This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
dig.flavor_text: The user burrows into the ground on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

disable.name: disable
disable.short_effect: Disables the target’s last used move for 1-8 turns.
disable.effect: Disables the target’s last used move, preventing its use for 4–7 turns, selected at random, or until the target leaves the field. If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed, if its last used move has 0 PP remaining, or if it already has a move disabled, this move will fail.
disable.flavor_text: For four turns, the target will be unable to use whichever move it last used.

dizzy-punch.name: dizzy-punch
dizzy-punch.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
dizzy-punch.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
dizzy-punch.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

double-edge.name: double-edge
double-edge.short_effect: User receives 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.
double-edge.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User takes 1/3 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
double-edge.flavor_text: A reckless life-risking tackle in which the user rushes the target. This also damages the user quite a lot.

double-kick.name: double-kick
double-kick.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Hits twice in one turn.
double-kick.flavor_text: The user attacks by kicking the target twice in a row using two feet.

double-slap.name: double-slap
double-slap.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Hits 2–5 times in one turn. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use.
double-slap.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

double-team.name: double-team
double-team.short_effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.
double-team.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.
double-team.flavor_text: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

draco-meteor.name: draco-meteor
draco-meteor.short_effect: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.
draco-meteor.effect: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
draco-meteor.flavor_text: Comets are summoned down from the sky onto the target. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

dragon-breath.name: dragon-breath
dragon-breath.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
dragon-breath.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
dragon-breath.flavor_text: The user exhales a mighty gust that inflicts damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

dragon-rage.name: dragon-rage
dragon-rage.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

dream-eater.name: dream-eater
dream-eater.short_effect: Only works on sleeping Pokémon. Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
dream-eater.effect: Fails if not used on a sleeping Pokémon. Inflicts regular damage. Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
dream-eater.flavor_text: The user eats the dreams of a sleeping target. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

drill-peck.name: drill-peck
drill-peck.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
drill-peck.flavor_text: A corkscrewing attack that strikes the target with a sharp beak acting as a drill.

dual-wingbeat.name: dual-wingbeat
dual-wingbeat.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
dual-wingbeat.flavor_text: The user slams the target with its wings to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

earthquake.name: earthquake
earthquake.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dig users.
earthquake.effect: Inflicts regular damage. If the target is in the first turn of dig, this move will hit with double power.
earthquake.flavor_text: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.

electroweb.name: electroweb
electroweb.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.
electroweb.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.
electroweb.flavor_text: The user captures opposing Pokémon in an electric net to inflict damage. This also lowers their Speed stats.

ember.name: ember
ember.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
ember.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
ember.flavor_text: The target is attacked with small flames. This may also leave the target with a burn.

encore.name: encore
encore.short_effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move every turn for 2 to 6 turns.
encore.effect: The next 4–8 times (selected at random) the target attempts to move, it is forced to repeat its last used move. If the selected move allows the trainer to select a target, an opponent will be selected at random each turn. If the target is prevented from using the selected move by some other effect, struggle will be used instead. This effect ends if the selected move runs out of PP. If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed, if it does not know the selected move, or if the selected move has 0 PP remaining, this move will fail. If the target’s last used move was encore, mimic, mirror move, sketch, struggle, or transform, this move will fail.
encore.flavor_text: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.

endeavor.name: endeavor
endeavor.short_effect: Lowers the target’s HP to equal the user’s.
endeavor.effect: Inflicts exactly enough damage to lower the target’s HP to equal the user’s. If the target’s HP is not higher than the user’s, this move has no effect. Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored. This effect counts as damage for moves that respond to damage.
endeavor.flavor_text: The user inflicts damage by cutting down the target's HP to roughly equal the user's HP.

endure.name: endure
endure.short_effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.
endure.effect: The user’s HP cannot be lowered below 1 by any means for the remainder of this turn. If the user successfully used detect, endure, protect, quick guard, or wide guard on the last turn, this move has a 50% chance to fail. This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
endure.flavor_text: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

entrainment.name: entrainment
entrainment.short_effect: Copies the user’s ability onto the target.
entrainment.effect: Changes the target’s ability to match the user’s. This effect ends when the target leaves battle.
entrainment.flavor_text: The user dances with an odd rhythm that compels the target to mimic it, making the target's Ability the same as the user's.

explosion.name: explosion
explosion.effect: User faints, even if the attack fails or misses. Inflicts regular damage.
explosion.flavor_text: The user attacks everything around it by causing a tremendous explosion. The user faints upon using this move.

facade.name: facade
facade.short_effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.
facade.effect: Inflicts regular damage. If the user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned, this move has double power.
facade.flavor_text: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

fairy-wind.name: fairy-wind
fairy-wind.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
fairy-wind.flavor_text: The user attacks by stirring up a fairy wind to strike the target.

fake-out.name: fake-out
fake-out.short_effect: Can only be used as the first move after the user enters battle. Causes the target to flinch.
fake-out.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Causes the target to flinch. Can only be used on the user’s first turn after entering the field.
fake-out.flavor_text: This attack hits first and makes the target flinch. It works only on the first turn each time the user enters battle.

false-swipe.name: false-swipe
false-swipe.short_effect: Cannot lower the target’s HP below 1.
false-swipe.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Will not reduce the target’s HP below 1.
false-swipe.flavor_text: A restrained attack that prevents the target from fainting. The target is left with at least 1 HP.

feint.name: feint
feint.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Removes the effects of detect or protect from the target before hitting. This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome.
feint.flavor_text: This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect. This also lifts the effects of those moves.

feint-attack.name: feint-attack
feint-attack.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
feint-attack.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

fire-blast.name: fire-blast
fire-blast.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
fire-blast.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
fire-blast.flavor_text: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

fire-punch.name: fire-punch
fire-punch.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
fire-punch.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
fire-punch.flavor_text: The target is attacked with a fiery punch. This may also leave the target with a burn.

fire-spin.name: fire-spin
fire-spin.short_effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
fire-spin.effect: Inflicts regular damage. For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn. The user continues to use other moves during this time. If the user leaves the field, this effect ends. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use. rapid spin cancels this effect.
fire-spin.flavor_text: The user traps the target inside a fierce vortex of fire that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

fissure.name: fissure
fissure.effect: Inflicts damage equal to the target’s max HP. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers. This move’s accuracy is 30% plus 1% for each level the user is higher than the target. If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail. Because this move inflicts a specific and finite amount of damage, endure still prevents the target from fainting. The effects of lock on, mind reader, and no guard still apply, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target. However, they will not give this move a chance to break through detect or protect.
fissure.flavor_text: The user opens up a fissure in the ground and drops the target in. The target faints instantly if this attack hits.

flail.name: flail
flail.short_effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.
flail.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Power varies inversely with the user’s proportional remaining HP. 64 * current HP / max HP | Power -----------------------: | ----: 0– 1 | 200 2– 5 | 150 6–12 | 100 13–21 | 80 22–42 | 40 43–64 | 20
flail.flavor_text: The user flails about aimlessly to attack. The less HP the user has, the greater the move's power.

flame-wheel.name: flame-wheel
flame-wheel.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target. Lets frozen Pokémon thaw themselves.
flame-wheel.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target. Frozen Pokémon may use this move, in which case they will thaw.
flame-wheel.flavor_text: The user attacks by cloaking itself in fire and charging at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

flamethrower.name: flamethrower
flamethrower.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
flamethrower.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
flamethrower.flavor_text: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

flash.name: flash
flash.short_effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flash.effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flash.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

flash-cannon.name: flash-cannon

flash-cannon.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

flatter.name: flatter

flatter.effect: Raises the target’s Special Attack by one stage, then confuses it.
flatter.flavor_text: Flattery is used to confuse the target. However, this also boosts the target's Sp. Atk stat.

fling.name: fling
fling.short_effect: Throws held item at the target; power depends on the item.
fling.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Power and type are determined by the user’s held item. The item is consumed. If the user is not holding an item, or its item has no set type and power, this move will fail. This move ignores sticky hold. If the user is under the effect of embargo, this move will fail.
fling.flavor_text: The user flings its held item at the target to attack. This move's power and effects depend on the item.

fly.name: fly
fly.short_effect: User flies high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
fly.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User flies high into the air for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn. During the immune turn, gust, hurricane, sky uppercut, smack down, thunder, twister, and whirlwind still hit the user normally. gust and twister also have double power against the user. The damage from hail and sandstorm still applies during the immune turn. The user may be hit during its immune turn if under the effect of lock on, mind reader, or no guard. This move cannot be used while gravity is in effect. This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
fly.flavor_text: The user flies up into the sky on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

focus-energy.name: focus-energy
focus-energy.short_effect: Increases the user’s chance to score a critical hit.
focus-energy.effect: User’s critical hit rate is two levels higher until it leaves the field. If the user has already used focus energy since entering the field, this move will fail. This effect is passed on by baton pass.
focus-energy.flavor_text: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that its future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits.

foresight.name: foresight
foresight.short_effect: Forces the target to have no Evade, and allows it to be hit by Normal and Fighting moves even if it’s a Ghost.
foresight.effect: Resets the target’s evasion to normal and prevents any further boosting until the target leaves the field. A ghost under this effect takes normal damage from normal and fighting moves. This move itself ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
foresight.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

frustration.name: frustration
frustration.short_effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.
frustration.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Power increases inversely with happiness, given by `(255 - happiness) * 2 / 5`, to a maximum of 102. Power bottoms out at 1.
frustration.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

fury-attack.flavor_text: The user attacks by jabbing the target with a horn, a beak, or the like. This move hits two to five times in a row.

fury-cutter.name: fury-cutter
fury-cutter.short_effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, maxing out after five turns.
fury-cutter.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Power doubles after every time this move is used, whether consecutively or not, maxing out at 16x. If this move misses or the user leaves the field, power resets.
fury-cutter.flavor_text: The user attacks by slashing the target with scythes, claws, or the like. This attack becomes more powerful if it hits in succession.

fury-swipes.name: fury-swipes
fury-swipes.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Hits 2–5 times in one turn. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use.
fury-swipes.flavor_text: The user attacks by raking the target with claws, scythes, or the like. This move hits two to five times in a row.

future-sight.name: future-sight
future-sight.short_effect: Hits the target two turns later.
future-sight.effect: Inflicts typeless regular damage at the end of the third turn, starting with this one. This move cannot score a critical hit. If the target switches out, its replacement will be hit instead. Damage is calculated at the time this move is used; stat changes and switching out during the delay won’t change the damage inflicted. No move with this effect can be used against the same target again until after the end of the third turn. This effect breaks through wonder guard. If the target is protected by protect or detect on the turn this move is used, this move will fail. However, the damage on the third turn will break through protection. The damage is applied at the end of the turn, so it ignores endure and focus sash. This move cannot be copied by mirror move.
future-sight.flavor_text: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.

giga-drain.name: giga-drain
giga-drain.short_effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
giga-drain.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
giga-drain.flavor_text: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

glare.name: glare
glare.flavor_text: The user intimidates the target with the pattern on its belly to cause paralysis.

grassy-glide.name: grassy-glide
grassy-glide.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
grassy-glide.flavor_text: Gliding on the ground, the user attacks the target. This move always goes first on Grassy Terrain.

growl.name: growl
growl.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
growl.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
growl.flavor_text: The user growls in an endearing way, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Attack stats.

growth.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage each. During sunny day, raises both stats by two stages.

grudge.name: grudge
grudge.short_effect: If the user faints this turn, the PP of the move that fainted it drops to 0.
grudge.effect: If the user faints before it next acts, the move that fainted it will have its PP dropped to 0. End-of-turn damage does not trigger this effect.
grudge.flavor_text: If the user faints, the user’s grudge fully depletes the PP of the opponent’s move that knocked it out.

guillotine.name: guillotine

If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail. Because this move inflicts a specific and finite amount of damage, endure still prevents the target from fainting. The effects of lock on, mind reader, and no guard still apply, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target. However, they will not give this move a chance to break through detect or protect.
guillotine.flavor_text: A vicious tearing attack with big pincers. The target faints instantly if this attack hits.

gust.name: gust
gust.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Pokémon in the air.
gust.effect: Inflicts regular damage. If the target is under the effect of bounce, fly, or sky drop, this move will hit with double power.
gust.flavor_text: A gust of wind is whipped up by wings and launched at the target to inflict damage.

gyro-ball.name: gyro-ball
gyro-ball.short_effect: Power raises when the user has lower Speed, up to a maximum of 150.
gyro-ball.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Power increases with the target’s current Speed compared to the user, given by `1 + 25 * target Speed / user Speed`, capped at 150.
gyro-ball.flavor_text: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin. The slower the user is than the target, the greater the move's power.

harden.name: harden
harden.short_effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.
harden.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.
harden.flavor_text: The user stiffens all the muscles in its body to boost its Defense stat.

haze.name: haze
haze.short_effect: Resets all Pokémon’s stats, accuracy, and evasion.
haze.effect: Removes stat, accuracy, and evasion modifiers from every Pokémon on the field. This does not count as a stat reduction for the purposes of clear body or white smoke.
haze.flavor_text: The user creates a haze that eliminates every stat change among all the Pokémon engaged in battle.

headbutt.name: headbutt

helping-hand.flavor_text: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

hex.name: hex
hex.short_effect: Has double power if the target has a major status ailment.
hex.effect: Inflicts regular damage. If the target has a major status ailment, this move has double power.
hex.flavor_text: This relentless attack does massive damage to a target affected by status conditions.

hidden-power.name: hidden-power
hidden-power.short_effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs. Power can range from 30 to 70.
hidden-power.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Power and type are determined by the user’s IVs. Power is given by `x * 40 / 63 + 30`. `x` is obtained by arranging bit 1 from the IV for each of Special Defense, Special Attack, Speed, Defense, Attack, and HP in that order. (Bit 1 is 1 if the IV is of the form `4n + 2` or `4n + 3`. `x` is then 64 * Special Defense IV bit 1, plus 32 * Special Attack IV bit 1, etc.) Power is always between 30 and 70, inclusive. Average power is 49.5. Type is given by `y * 15 / 63`, where `y` is similar to `x` above, except constructed from bit 0. (Bit 0 is 1 if the IV is odd.) The result is looked up in the following table. Value | Type ----: | -------- 0 | fighting 1 | flying 2 | poison 3 | ground 4 | rock 5 | bug 6 | ghost 7 | steel 8 | fire 9 | water 10 | grass 11 | electric 12 | psychic 13 | ice 14 | dragon 15 | dark This move thus cannot be normal. Most other types have an equal 1/16 chance to be selected, given random IVs. However, due to the flooring used here, bug, fighting, and grass appear 5/64 of the time, and dark only 1/64 of the time.
hidden-power.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

high-jump-kick.name: high-jump-kick
high-jump-kick.short_effect: If the user misses, it takes half the damage it would have inflicted in recoil.
high-jump-kick.effect: Inflicts regular damage. If this move misses, is blocked by protect or detect, or has no effect, the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP rounded down. This move cannot be used while gravity is in effect.
high-jump-kick.flavor_text: The target is attacked with a knee kick from a jump. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.

icicle-spear.flavor_text: The user attacks by launching sharp icicles at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

icy-wind.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
icy-wind.flavor_text: The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. This also lowers opposing Pokémon's Speed stats.

iron-defense.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.
iron-defense.flavor_text: The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

iron-head.name: iron-head

iron-tail.flavor_text: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

karate-chop.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
karate-chop.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

knock-off.name: knock-off
knock-off.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Target loses its held item. Neither the user nor the target can recover its item with recycle. If the target has multitype or sticky hold, it will take damage but not lose its item.
knock-off.flavor_text: The user slaps down the target's held item, making it unusable for that battle. This move does more damage if the target has a held item.

last-resort.name: last-resort
last-resort.short_effect: Can only be used after all of the user’s other moves have been used.
last-resort.effect: Inflicts regular damage. This move can only be used if each of the user’s other moves has been used at least once since the user entered the field. If this is the user’s only move, this move will fail.
last-resort.flavor_text: This move can be used only after the user has used all the other moves it knows in the battle.

leech-seed.name: leech-seed

leech-seed.effect: Plants a seed on the target that drains 1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn and heals the user for the amount taken. Has no effect on grass Pokémon. The seed remains until the target leaves the field. The user takes damage instead of being healed if the target has liquid ooze. rapid spin will remove this effect. This effect is passed on by baton pass.
leech-seed.flavor_text: A seed is planted on the target. It steals some HP from the target every turn.

leer.name: leer
leer.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.
leer.effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.
leer.flavor_text: The user gives opposing Pokémon an intimidating leer that lowers their Defense stats.

lick.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.

light-screen.name: light-screen

lock-on.name: lock-on

If the target uses detect or protect while under the effect of this move, the user is not guaranteed to hit, but has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection. low-kick.name: low-kick

meditate.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
meditate.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
