megahorn.name: megahorn
megahorn.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
megahorn.flavor_text: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.

memento.name: memento
memento.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by two stages. User faints.
memento.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by two stages. User faints.
memento.flavor_text: The user faints. In return, the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats are harshly lowered.

metal-claw.name: metal-claw
metal-claw.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user’s Attack by one stage.
metal-claw.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user’s Attack one stage.
metal-claw.flavor_text: The target is raked with steel claws. This may also boost the user's Attack stat.

metal-sound.name: metal-sound
metal-sound.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
metal-sound.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
metal-sound.flavor_text: A horrible sound like scraping metal harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

metronome.name: metronome
metronome.short_effect: Randomly selects and uses any move in the game.
metronome.effect: Selects any move at random and uses it. Moves the user already knows are not eligible. Assist, meta, protection, and reflection moves are also not eligible; specifically, assist, chatter, copycat, counter, covet, destiny bond, detect, endure, feint, focus punch, follow me, helping hand, me first, metronome, mimic, mirror coat, mirror move, protect, quick guard, sketch, sleep talk, snatch, struggle, switcheroo, thief, trick, and wide guard will not be selected by this move. This move cannot be copied by mimic or mirror move, nor selected by assist, metronome, or sleep talk.
metronome.flavor_text: The user waggles a finger and stimulates its brain into randomly using nearly any move.

mimic.name: mimic
mimic.short_effect: Copies the target’s last used move.
mimic.effect: This move is replaced by the target’s last successfully used move, and its PP changes to 5. If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed, or if the user already knows the targeted move, this move will fail. This effect vanishes when the user leaves the field. If chatter, metronome, mimic, sketch, or struggle is selected, this move will fail. This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome, nor forced by encore.
mimic.flavor_text: The user copies the move last used by the target. The copied move can be used until the user of Mimic leaves the battle.

mind-reader.name: mind-reader
mind-reader.short_effect: Ensures that the user’s next move will hit the target.
mind-reader.effect: If the user targets the same target again before the end of the next turn, the move it uses is guaranteed to hit. This move itself also ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers. One-hit KO moves are also guaranteed to hit, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target. This effect also allows the user to hit Pokémon that are off the field due to moves such as dig or fly. If the target uses detect or protect while under the effect of this move, the user is not guaranteed to hit, but has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection. This effect is passed on by baton pass.
mind-reader.flavor_text: The user senses the target’s movements with its mind to ensure its next attack does not miss the target.

minimize.name: minimize
minimize.short_effect: Raises the user’s evasion by two stages.
minimize.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by two stages. stomp and steamroller have double power against Pokémon that have used this move since entering the field.
minimize.flavor_text: The user compresses its body to make itself look smaller, which sharply boosts its evasiveness.

mirror-coat.name: mirror-coat
mirror-coat.short_effect: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last special hit it took.
mirror-coat.effect: Targets the last opposing Pokémon to hit the user with a special move this turn. Inflicts twice the damage that move did to the user. If there is no eligible target, this move will fail. Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored. This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome.
mirror-coat.flavor_text: A retaliatory attack that counters any special move, inflicting double the damage taken.

mirror-move.name: mirror-move
mirror-move.short_effect: Uses the target’s last used move.
mirror-move.effect: Uses the last move targeted at the user by a Pokémon still on the field. A move counts as targeting the user even if it hit multiple Pokémon, as long as the user was one of them; however, moves targeting the field itself do not count. If the user has not been targeted by an appropriate move since entering the field, or if no Pokémon that targeted the user remains on the field, this move will fail. Moves that failed, missed, had no effect, or were blocked are still copied. Assist moves, time-delayed moves, “meta” moves that operate on other moves/Pokémon/abilities, and some other special moves cannot be copied and are ignored; if the last move to hit the user was such a move, the previous move will be used instead. The full list of ignored moves is: acid armor, acupressure, after you, agility, ally switch, amnesia, aqua ring, aromatherapy, aromatic mist, assist, autotomize, barrier, baton pass, belch, belly drum, bide, bulk up, calm mind, camouflage, celebrate, charge, coil, conversion, conversion 2, copycat, cosmic power, cotton guard, counter, crafty shield, curse, defend order, defense curl, destiny bond, detect, doom desire, double team, dragon dance, electric terrain, endure, final gambit, flower shield, focus energy, focus punch, follow me, future sight, geomancy, grassy terrain, gravity, growth, grudge, guard split, hail, happy hour, harden, haze, heal bell, heal order, heal pulse, healing wish, helping hand, hold hands, hone claws, howl, imprison, ingrain, ion deluge, iron defense, kings shield, light screen, lucky chant, lunar dance, magic coat, magnet rise, magnetic flux, mat block, me first, meditate, metronome, milk drink, mimic, minimize, mirror coat, mirror move, mist, misty terrain, moonlight, morning sun, mud sport, nasty plot, nature power, perish song, power split, power trick, protect, psych up, quick guard, quiver dance, rage powder, rain dance, recover, recycle, reflect, reflect type, refresh, rest, rock polish, role play, roost, rototiller, safeguard, sandstorm, shadow blast, shadow bolt, shadow half, shadow rush, shadow shed, shadow sky, shadow storm, shadow wave, sharpen, shell smash, shift gear, sketch, slack off, sleep talk, snatch, soft boiled, spikes, spiky shield, spit up, splash, stealth rock, sticky web, stockpile, struggle, substitute, sunny day, swallow, swords dance, synthesis, tail glow, tailwind, teleport, toxic spikes, transform, water sport, wide guard, wish, withdraw and work up. This move cannot be selected by assist, metronome, or sleep talk, nor forced by encore.
mirror-move.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

mist.name: mist
mist.short_effect: Protects the user’s stats from being changed by enemy moves.
mist.effect: Pokémon on the user’s side of the field are immune to stat-lowering effects for five turns. guard swap, heart swap, and power swap may still be used. defog used by an opponent will end this effect.
mist.flavor_text: The user cloaks itself and its allies in a white mist that prevents any of their stats from being lowered for five turns.

mud-slap.name: mud-slap
mud-slap.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
mud-slap.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
mud-slap.flavor_text: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

nasty-plot.name: nasty-plot
nasty-plot.short_effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
nasty-plot.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
nasty-plot.flavor_text: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

night-shade.name: night-shade
night-shade.short_effect: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.
night-shade.effect: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level. Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.
night-shade.flavor_text: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

nightmare.name: nightmare
nightmare.short_effect: Target loses 1/4 its max HP every turn as long as it’s asleep.
nightmare.effect: Only works on sleeping Pokémon. Gives the target a nightmare, damaging it for 1/4 its max HP every turn. If the target wakes up or leaves the field, this effect ends.
nightmare.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

nuzzle.name: nuzzle
nuzzle.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
nuzzle.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
nuzzle.flavor_text: The user attacks by nuzzling its electrified cheeks against the target. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

octazooka.name: octazooka
octazooka.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
octazooka.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
octazooka.flavor_text: The user attacks by spraying ink in the target’s face or eyes. This may also lower the target’s accuracy.

ominous-wind.name: ominous-wind
ominous-wind.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise all of the user’s stats by one stage.
ominous-wind.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise all of the user’s stats one stage.
ominous-wind.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

outrage.name: outrage
outrage.short_effect: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
outrage.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random. After the last hit, the user becomes confused. safeguard does not protect against the confusion from this move.
outrage.flavor_text: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

pain-split.name: pain-split
pain-split.short_effect: Sets the user’s and targets’s HP to the average of their current HP.
pain-split.effect: Changes the user’s and target’s remaining HP to the average of their current remaining HP. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers. This effect does not count as inflicting damage for other moves and effects that respond to damage taken. This effect fails against a substitute.
pain-split.flavor_text: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally splits the combined HP between the target and itself.

pay-day.name: pay-day
pay-day.short_effect: Scatters money on the ground worth five times the user’s level.
pay-day.effect: Inflicts regular damage. After the battle ends, the winner receives five times the user’s level in extra money for each time this move was used.
pay-day.flavor_text: Coins are hurled at the target to inflict damage. Money is earned after the battle.

peck.name: peck
peck.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
peck.flavor_text: The target is jabbed with a sharply pointed beak or horn to inflict damage.

perish-song.name: perish-song
perish-song.short_effect: User and target both faint after three turns.
perish-song.effect: Every Pokémon is given a counter that starts at 3 and decreases by 1 at the end of every turn, including this one. When a Pokémon’s counter reaches zero, that Pokémon faints. A Pokémon that leaves the field will lose its counter; its replacement does not inherit the effect, and other Pokémon’s counters remain. This effect is passed on by baton pass. This move cannot be copied by mirror move.
perish-song.flavor_text: Any Pokémon that hears this song faints in three turns, unless it switches out of battle.

petal-dance.name: petal-dance
petal-dance.short_effect: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
petal-dance.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random. After the last hit, the user becomes confused. safeguard does not protect against the confusion from this move.
petal-dance.flavor_text: The user attacks the target by scattering petals for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

pin-missile.name: pin-missile
pin-missile.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Hits 2–5 times in one turn. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use.
pin-missile.flavor_text: The user attacks by shooting sharp spikes at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

poison-gas.name: poison-gas
poison-gas.flavor_text: A cloud of poison gas is sprayed in the faces of opposing Pokémon, poisoning those it hits.

poison-powder.name: poison-powder
poison-powder.flavor_text: The user scatters a cloud of poisonous dust that poisons the target.

poison-sting.name: poison-sting
poison-sting.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
poison-sting.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
poison-sting.flavor_text: The user stabs the target with a poisonous stinger to inflict damage. This may also poison the target.

pounce.name: pounce
pounce.flavor_text: The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

pound.name: pound
pound.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
pound.flavor_text: The target is physically pounded with a long tail, a foreleg, or the like.

powder-snow.name: powder-snow
powder-snow.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.
powder-snow.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.
powder-snow.flavor_text: The user attacks with a chilling gust of powdery snow. This may also leave opposing Pokémon frozen.

power-gem.name: power-gem
power-gem.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
power-gem.flavor_text: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

power-up-punch.name: power-up-punch
power-up-punch.short_effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.
power-up-punch.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
power-up-punch.flavor_text: Striking opponents over and over makes the user’s fists harder. Hitting a target raises the Attack stat.

present.name: present
present.short_effect: Randomly inflicts damage with power from 40 to 120 or heals the target for 1/4 its max HP.
present.effect: Randomly uses one of the following effects. Effect | Chance -------------------------------------------------- | -----: Inflicts regular damage with 40 power | 40% Inflicts regular damage with 80 power | 30% Inflicts regular damage with 120 power | 10% Heals the target for 1/4 its max HP | 20% On average, this move inflicts regular damage with 52 power and heals the target for 1/20 its max HP.
present.flavor_text: The user attacks by giving the target a gift with a hidden trap. The gift restores HP sometimes, however.

protect.name: protect
protect.short_effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.
protect.effect: No moves will hit the user for the remainder of this turn. If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail. If the user successfully used detect, endure, protect, quick guard, or wide guard on the last turn, this move has a 50% chance to fail. lock on, mind reader, and no guard provide a (100 – accuracy)% chance for moves to break through this move. This does not apply to one-hit KO moves (fissure, guillotine, horn drill, and sheer cold); those are always blocked by this move. thunder during rain dance and blizzard during hail have a 30% chance to break through this move. The following effects are not prevented by this move: * acupressure from an ally * curse’s curse effect * Delayed damage from doom desire and future sight; however, these moves will be prevented if they are used this turn * feint, which will also end this move’s protection after it hits * imprison * perish song * shadow force * Moves that merely copy the user, such as transform or psych up This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
protect.flavor_text: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

psybeam.name: psybeam
psybeam.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
psybeam.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
psybeam.flavor_text: The target is attacked with a peculiar ray. This may also confuse the target.

psych-up.name: psych-up
psych-up.short_effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.
psych-up.effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s. This move cannot be copied by mirror move.
psych-up.flavor_text: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.

psychic.name: psychic
psychic.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
psychic.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
psychic.flavor_text: The target is hit with a strong telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

psywave.name: psywave
psywave.short_effect: Inflicts damage between 50% and 150% of the user’s level.
psywave.effect: Inflicts typeless damage between 50% and 150% of the user’s level, selected at random in increments of 10%.
psywave.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

quick-attack.name: quick-attack
quick-attack.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
quick-attack.flavor_text: The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

rage.name: rage
rage.short_effect: If the user is hit after using this move, its Attack rises by one stage.
rage.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Every time the user is hit after it uses this move but before its next action, its Attack raises by one stage.
rage.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

rage-powder.name: rage-powder
rage-powder.short_effect: Redirects the target’s single-target effects to the user for this turn.
rage-powder.effect: Until the end of this turn, any moves that opposing Pokémon target solely at the user’s ally will instead target the user. If both Pokémon on the same side of the field use this move on the same turn, the Pokémon that uses it last will become the target. This effect takes priority over lightning rod and storm drain. If the user’s ally switches out, opposing Pokémon may still hit it with pursuit. This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
rage-powder.flavor_text: The user scatters a cloud of irritating powder to draw attention to itself. Opposing Pokémon aim only at the user.

rain-dance.name: rain-dance
rain-dance.short_effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.
rain-dance.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns, during which water moves inflict 50% extra damage, and fire moves inflict half damage. If the user is holding damp rock, this effect lasts for eight turns. thunder has 100% accuracy. If the target has used detect or protect, thunder has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection. solar beam has half power. moonlight, morning sun, and synthesis heal only 1/4 of the user’s max HP. Pokémon with swift swim have doubled original Speed. Pokémon with forecast become water. Pokémon with dry skin heal 1/8 max HP, Pokémon with hydration are cured of major status effects, and Pokémon with rain dish heal 1/16 max HP at the end of each turn.
rain-dance.flavor_text: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

rapid-spin.name: rapid-spin
rapid-spin.short_effect: Frees the user from binding moves, removes Leech Seed, and blows away Spikes.
rapid-spin.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Removes leech seed from the user, frees the user from bind, clamp, fire spin, magma storm, sand tomb, whirlpool, and wrap, and clears spikes, stealth rock, and toxic spikes from the user’s side of the field. If this move misses or has no effect, its effect doesn’t activate.
rapid-spin.flavor_text: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

razor-leaf.name: razor-leaf
razor-leaf.short_effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
razor-leaf.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
razor-leaf.flavor_text: Sharp-edged leaves are launched to slash at opposing Pokémon. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

razor-wind.name: razor-wind
razor-wind.short_effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.
razor-wind.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move. User charges for one turn before attacking. This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
razor-wind.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

recover.name: recover
recover.short_effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.
recover.effect: Heals the user for half its max HP.
recover.flavor_text: The user regenerates its cells, restoring its own HP by up to half its max HP.

recycle.name: recycle
recycle.short_effect: User recovers the item it last used up.
recycle.effect: User recovers the last item consumed by the user or a Pokémon in its position on the field. The item must be used again before it can be recovered by this move again. If the user is holding an item, this move fails. Items taken or given away by covet, knock off, switcheroo, thief, or trick may not be recovered.
recycle.flavor_text: The user recycles a held item that has been used in battle so it can be used again.

reflect.name: reflect
reflect.short_effect: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.
reflect.effect: Erects a barrier around the user’s side of the field that reduces damage from physical attacks by half for five turns. In double battles, the reduction is 1/3. Critical hits are not affected by the barrier. If the user is holding light clay, the barrier lasts for eight turns. brick break or defog used by an opponent will destroy the barrier.
reflect.flavor_text: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

rest.name: rest
rest.short_effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.
rest.effect: User falls to sleep and immediately regains all its HP. If the user has another major status effect, sleep will replace it. The user will always wake up after two turns, or one turn with early bird. This move fails if the Pokémon cannot fall asleep due to uproar, insomnia, or vital spirit. It also fails if the Pokémon is at full health or is already asleep.
rest.flavor_text: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

return.name: return
return.short_effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.
return.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Power increases with happiness, given by `happiness * 2 / 5`, to a maximum of 102. Power bottoms out at 1.
return.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

reversal.name: reversal
reversal.short_effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.
reversal.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Power varies inversely with the user’s proportional remaining HP. 64 * current HP / max HP | Power -----------------------: | ----: 0– 1 | 200 2– 5 | 150 6–12 | 100 13–21 | 80 22–42 | 40 43–64 | 20
reversal.flavor_text: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

roar.name: roar
roar.short_effect: Immediately ends wild battles. Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.
roar.effect: Switches the target out for another of its trainer’s Pokémon selected at random. Wild battles end immediately. Doesn’t affect Pokémon with suction cups or under the effect of ingrain.
roar.flavor_text: The target is scared off, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

rock-slide.name: rock-slide
rock-slide.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
rock-slide.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
rock-slide.flavor_text: Large boulders are hurled at opposing Pokémon to inflict damage. This may also make the opposing Pokémon flinch.

rock-smash.name: rock-smash
rock-smash.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
rock-smash.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
rock-smash.flavor_text: The user attacks with a punch. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

rock-throw.name: rock-throw
rock-throw.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
rock-throw.flavor_text: The user picks up and throws a small rock at the target to inflict damage.

rock-tomb.name: rock-tomb
rock-tomb.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
rock-tomb.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
rock-tomb.flavor_text: The user hurls boulders at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the target's Speed stat by cutting off its movement.

rolling-kick.name: rolling-kick
rolling-kick.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
rolling-kick.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
rolling-kick.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

rollout.name: rollout
rollout.short_effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, resetting after five turns.
rollout.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User is forced to use this move for five turns. Power doubles every time this move is used in succession to a maximum of 16x, and resets to normal after the lock-in ends. If this move misses or becomes unusable, the lock-in ends. If the user has used defense curl since entering the field, this move has double power.
rollout.flavor_text: The user continually rolls into the target over five turns. This attack becomes more powerful each time it hits.

round.name: round
round.short_effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.
round.effect: Inflicts regular damage. If round has already been used this turn, this move’s power is doubled. After this move is used, any other Pokémon using it this turn will immediately do so (in the order they would otherwise act), regardless of Speed or priority. Pokémon using other moves will then continue to act as usual.
round.flavor_text: The user attacks the target with a song. If others use this move, they will act immediately after the initial user, and the power of their Rounds will be boosted.

safeguard.name: safeguard
safeguard.short_effect: Protects the user’s field from major status ailments and confusion for five turns.
safeguard.effect: Protects Pokémon on the user’s side of the field from major status effects and confusion for five turns. Does not cancel existing ailments. This effect remains even if the user leaves the field. If yawn is used while this move is in effect, it will immediately fail. defog used by an opponent will end this effect. This effect does not prevent the confusion caused by outrage, petal dance, or thrash.
safeguard.flavor_text: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

sand-attack.name: sand-attack
sand-attack.short_effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.
sand-attack.effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.
sand-attack.flavor_text: Sand is hurled in the target's face, lowering the target's accuracy.

sandstorm.name: sandstorm
sandstorm.short_effect: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.
sandstorm.effect: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns. Pokémon that are not ground, rock, or steel take 1/16 their max HP at the end of every turn. Every rock Pokémon’s original Special Defense is raised by 50% for the duration of this effect. solar beam’s power is halved. moonlight, morning sun, and synthesis only heal 1/4 the user’s max HP.
sandstorm.flavor_text: A five-turn sandstorm is summoned to damage all Pokémon except Rock, Ground, and Steel types. The sandstorm also boosts the Sp. Def stats of Rock types.

scary-face.name: scary-face
scary-face.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
scary-face.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
scary-face.flavor_text: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly lower its Speed stat.

scratch.name: scratch
scratch.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
scratch.flavor_text: Hard, pointed, sharp claws rake the target to inflict damage.

screech.name: screech
screech.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.
screech.effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.
screech.flavor_text: An earsplitting screech harshly lowers the target's Defense stat.

seismic-toss.name: seismic-toss
seismic-toss.short_effect: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.
seismic-toss.effect: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level. Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.
seismic-toss.flavor_text: The target is thrown using the power of gravity. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

self-destruct.name: self-destruct
self-destruct.effect: User faints, even if the attack fails or misses. Inflicts regular damage.
self-destruct.flavor_text: The user attacks everything around it by causing an explosion. The user faints upon using this move.

shadow-ball.name: shadow-ball
shadow-ball.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
shadow-ball.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
shadow-ball.flavor_text: The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

sharpen.name: sharpen
sharpen.short_effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
sharpen.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
sharpen.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

sing.name: sing
sing.flavor_text: A soothing lullaby is sung in a beautiful voice that puts the target to sleep.

sketch.name: sketch
sketch.short_effect: Permanently becomes the target’s last used move.
sketch.effect: Permanently replaces itself with the target’s last used move. If that move is chatter or struggle, this move will fail. This move cannot be copied by mimic or mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome, nor forced by encore.
sketch.flavor_text: This move enables the user to permanently learn the move last used by the target. Once used, Sketch disappears.

skill-swap.name: skill-swap
skill-swap.effect: User and target switch abilities. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers. If either Pokémon has multitype or wonder guard, this move will fail.
skill-swap.flavor_text: The user employs its psychic power to exchange Abilities with the target.

skitter-smack.name: skitter-smack
skitter-smack.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
skitter-smack.flavor_text: The user skitters behind the target to attack. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

skull-bash.name: skull-bash
skull-bash.short_effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage. User charges for one turn before attacking.
skull-bash.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Raises the user’s Defense by one stage. User then charges for one turn before attacking. This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
skull-bash.flavor_text: The user tucks in its head to raise its Defense stat on the first turn, then rams the target on the next turn.

sky-attack.name: sky-attack
sky-attack.short_effect: User charges for one turn before attacking. Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
sky-attack.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User charges for one turn before attacking. Critical hit chance is one level higher than normal. Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch. This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
sky-attack.flavor_text: The user attacks the turn after using this move. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also make the target flinch.

slam.name: slam
slam.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
slam.flavor_text: The target is slammed with a long tail, vines, or the like to inflict damage.

slash.name: slash
slash.short_effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
slash.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
slash.flavor_text: The target is attacked with a slash of claws, scythes, or the like. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

sleep-powder.name: sleep-powder
sleep-powder.flavor_text: The user scatters a cloud of soporific dust that puts the target to sleep.

sleep-talk.name: sleep-talk
sleep-talk.short_effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves. Only works if the user is sleeping.
sleep-talk.effect: Only usable if the user is sleeping. Randomly selects and uses one of the user’s other three moves. Use of the selected move requires and costs 0 PP. This move will not select assist, bide, bounce, chatter, copycat, dig, dive, fly, focus punch, me first, metronome, mirror move, shadow force, skull bash, sky attack, sky drop, sleep talk, solar beam, razor wind, or uproar. If the selected move requires a recharge turn—i.e., one of blast burn, frenzy plant, giga impact, hydro cannon, hyper beam, roar of time, or rock wrecker—and the user is still sleeping next turn, then it’s forced to use this move again and pay another PP for the recharge turn. This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist, metronome, or sleep talk.
sleep-talk.flavor_text: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

sludge.name: sludge
sludge.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
sludge.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
sludge.flavor_text: The user hurls unsanitary sludge at the target to inflict damage. This may also poison the target.

sludge-bomb.name: sludge-bomb
sludge-bomb.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
sludge-bomb.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
sludge-bomb.flavor_text: The user hurls unsanitary sludge at the target to inflict damage. This may also poison the target.

smog.name: smog
smog.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
smog.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
smog.flavor_text: The target is attacked with a discharge of filthy gases. This may also poison the target.

smokescreen.name: smokescreen
smokescreen.short_effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.
smokescreen.effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.
smokescreen.flavor_text: The user releases an obscuring cloud of smoke or ink. This lowers the target's accuracy.

snore.name: snore
snore.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch. Only works if the user is sleeping.
snore.effect: Only usable if the user is sleeping. Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
snore.flavor_text: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

solar-beam.name: solar-beam
solar-beam.short_effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.
solar-beam.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User charges for one turn before attacking. During sunny day, the charge turn is skipped. During hail, rain dance, or sandstorm, power is halved. This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
solar-beam.flavor_text: The user gathers light on the first turn, then blasts a bundled beam on the next turn.

sonic-boom.name: sonic-boom
sonic-boom.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

spark.name: spark
spark.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
spark.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
spark.flavor_text: The user attacks the target with an electrically charged tackle. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

spider-web.name: spider-web
spider-web.short_effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.
spider-web.effect: The target cannot switch out normally. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers. This effect ends when the user leaves the field. The target may still escape by using baton pass, u turn, or a shed shell. Both the user and the target pass on this effect with baton pass.
spider-web.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

spike-cannon.name: spike-cannon
spike-cannon.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Hits 2–5 times in one turn. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use.
spike-cannon.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

spikes.name: spikes
spikes.short_effect: Scatters Spikes, hurting opposing Pokémon that switch in.
spikes.effect: Scatters spikes around the opposing field, which damage opposing Pokémon that enter the field for 1/8 of their max HP. Pokémon immune to ground moves are immune to this damage, except during gravity. Up to three layers of spikes may be laid down, adding 1/16 to the damage done: two layers of spikes damage for 3/16 max HP, and three layers damage for 1/4 max HP. wonder guard does not block damage from this effect. rapid spin removes this effect from its user’s side of the field. defog removes this effect from its target’s side of the field.
spikes.flavor_text: The user lays a trap of spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will damage opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

spit-up.name: spit-up
spit-up.short_effect: Power is 100 times the amount of energy Stockpiled.
spit-up.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Power is equal to 100 times the amount of energy stored by stockpile. Ignores the random factor in the damage formula. Stored energy is consumed, and the user’s Defense and Special Defense are reset to what they would be if stockpile had not been used. If the user has no energy stored, this move will fail. This move cannot be copied by mirror move.
spit-up.flavor_text: The power stored using the move Stockpile is released at once in an attack. The more power is stored, the greater the move's power.

spite.name: spite
spite.short_effect: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.
spite.effect: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4. If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed, or if its last used move has 0 PP remaining, this move will fail.
spite.flavor_text: The user unleashes its grudge on the move last used by the target by cutting 4 PP from it.

splash.name: splash
splash.effect: Does nothing. This move cannot be used while gravity is in effect.
splash.flavor_text: The user just flops and splashes around to no effect at all...

spore.name: spore
spore.flavor_text: The user scatters bursts of spores that induce sleep.

steel-beam.name: steel-beam
steel-beam.short_effect: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up.
steel-beam.effect: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up. The user still takes damage if the move is blocked by Protect or Substitute, misses, or if the target has Flash Fire.
steel-beam.flavor_text: The user fires a beam of steel that it collected from its entire body. This also damages the user.

steel-wing.name: steel-wing
steel-wing.short_effect: Has a 10% chance to raise the user’s Defense by one stage.
steel-wing.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a 10% chance to raise the user’s Defense one stage.
steel-wing.flavor_text: The target is hit with wings of steel. This may also boost the user's Defense stat.

sticky-web.name: sticky-web
sticky-web.short_effect: Covers the opposing field, lowering opponents’ Speed by one stage upon switching in.
sticky-web.effect: Shoots a web over the opponents’ side of the field, which lowers the Speed of any opposing Pokémon that enters the field by one stage. Pokémon in the air, such as flying-types and those with levitate, are unaffected. rapid spin removes Sticky Web from the user’s side of the field; defog removes it from both sides.
sticky-web.flavor_text: The user weaves a sticky net around the opposing team, which lowers their Speed stats upon switching into battle.

stockpile.name: stockpile
stockpile.short_effect: Stores energy up to three times for use with Spit Up and Swallow.
stockpile.effect: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each. Stores energy for use with spit up and swallow. Up to three levels of energy can be stored, and all are lost if the user leaves the field. Energy is still stored even if the stat boosts cannot be applied. If the user uses baton pass, the stat boosts are passed as normal, but the stored energy is not.
stockpile.flavor_text: The user stores power and boosts its Defense and Sp. Def stats. This move can be used up to three times.

stomp.name: stomp
stomp.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
stomp.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch. Power is doubled against Pokémon that have used minimize since entering the field.
stomp.flavor_text: The user attacks by stomping on the target with a big foot. This may also make the target flinch.

strength.name: strength
strength.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
strength.flavor_text: The target is slugged with a punch thrown at maximum power.

string-shot.name: string-shot
string-shot.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
string-shot.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
string-shot.flavor_text: The user blows silk from its mouth that binds opposing Pokémon and harshly lowers their Speed stats.

struggle-bug.name: struggle-bug
struggle-bug.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
struggle-bug.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
struggle-bug.flavor_text: The user attacks by struggling against opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Sp. Atk stats.

stun-spore.name: stun-spore
stun-spore.flavor_text: The user scatters a cloud of numbing powder that paralyzes the target.

submission.name: submission
submission.short_effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
submission.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User takes 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
submission.flavor_text: The user grabs the target and recklessly dives for the ground. This also damages the user a little.

substitute.name: substitute
substitute.short_effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.
substitute.effect: Transfers 1/4 the user’s max HP into a doll that absorbs damage and causes most negative move effects to fail. If the user leaves the field, the doll will vanish. If the user cannot pay the HP cost, this move will fail. The doll takes damage as normal, using the user’s stats and types, and will break when its HP reaches zero. Self-inflicted damage from confusion or recoil is not absorbed. Healing effects from opponents ignore the doll and heal the user as normal. Moves that work based on the user’s HP still do so; the doll’s HP does not influence any move. The doll will block major status effects, confusion, and flinching. The effects of smelling salts and wake up slap do not trigger against a doll, even if the Pokémon behind the doll has the appropriate major status effect. Multi-turn trapping moves like wrap will hit the doll for their regular damage, but the multi-turn trapping and damage effects will not activate. Moves blocked or damage absorbed by the doll do not count as hitting the user or inflicting damage for any effects that respond to such, e.g., avalanche, counter, or a rowap berry. magic coat still works as normal, even against moves the doll would block. Opposing Pokémon that damage the doll with a leech move like absorb are healed as normal. It will also block acupressure, block, the curse effect of curse, dream eater, embargo, flatter, gastro acid, grudge, heal block, leech seed, lock on, mean look, mimic, mind reader, nightmare, pain split, psycho shift, spider web, sketch, swagger, switcheroo, trick, worry seed, and yawn. A Pokémon affected by yawn before summoning the doll will still fall to sleep. The doll blocks intimidate, but all other abilities act as though the doll did not exist. If the user has an ability that absorbs moves of a certain type for HP (such as volt absorb absorbing thunder wave), such moves will not be blocked. life orb and berries that cause confusion still work as normal, but their respective HP loss and confusion are absorbed/blocked by the doll. The user is still vulnerable to damage inflicted when entering or leaving the field, such as by pursuit or spikes; however, the doll will block the poison effect of toxic spikes. The doll is passed on by baton pass. It keeps its existing HP, but uses the replacement Pokémon’s stats and types for damage calculation. All other effects work as normal.
substitute.flavor_text: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

sucker-punch.name: sucker-punch
sucker-punch.short_effect: Only works if the target is about to use a damaging move.
sucker-punch.effect: Inflicts regular damage. If the target has not selected a damaging move this turn, or if the target has already acted this turn, this move will fail. This move is not affected by iron fist.
sucker-punch.flavor_text: This move enables the user to attack first. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

sunny-day.name: sunny-day
sunny-day.short_effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.
sunny-day.effect: Changes the weather to sunshine for five turns, during which fire moves inflict 50% extra damage, and water moves inflict half damage. If the user is holding heat rock, this effect lasts for eight turns. Pokémon cannot become frozen. thunder has 50% accuracy. solar beam skips its charge turn. moonlight, morning sun, and synthesis heal 2/3 of the user’s max HP. Pokémon with chlorophyll have doubled original Speed. Pokémon with forecast become fire. Pokémon with leaf guard are not affected by major status effects. Pokémon with flower gift change form; every Pokémon on their side of the field have their original Attack and Special Attack increased by 50%. Pokémon with dry skin lose 1/8 max HP at the end of each turn. Pokémon with solar power have their original Special Attack raised by 50% but lose 1/8 their max HP at the end of each turn.
sunny-day.flavor_text: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

super-fang.name: super-fang
super-fang.short_effect: Inflicts damage equal to half the target’s HP.
super-fang.effect: Inflicts typeless damage equal to half the target’s remaining HP.
super-fang.flavor_text: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. This cuts the target's HP in half.

supersonic.name: supersonic
supersonic.flavor_text: The user generates odd sound waves from its body that confuse the target.

surf.name: surf
surf.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dive users.
surf.effect: Inflicts regular damage. If the target is in the first turn of dive, this move will hit with double power.
surf.flavor_text: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

swagger.name: swagger
swagger.short_effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.
swagger.effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages, then confuses it. If the target’s Attack cannot be raised by two stages, the confusion is not applied.
swagger.flavor_text: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

sweet-kiss.name: sweet-kiss
sweet-kiss.flavor_text: The user kisses the target with a sweet, angelic cuteness that causes confusion.

sweet-scent.name: sweet-scent
sweet-scent.short_effect: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.
sweet-scent.effect: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.
sweet-scent.flavor_text: The user releases a scent that harshly lowers opposing Pokémon's evasiveness.

swift.name: swift
swift.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
swift.flavor_text: Star-shaped rays are shot at opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

swords-dance.name: swords-dance
swords-dance.short_effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.
swords-dance.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.
swords-dance.flavor_text: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply boosts the user's Attack stat.

synthesis.name: synthesis
synthesis.short_effect: Heals the user by half its max HP. Affected by weather.
synthesis.effect: Heals the user for half its max HP. During sunny day, the healing is increased to 2/3 max HP. During hail, rain dance, or sandstorm, the healing is decreased to 1/4 max HP.
synthesis.flavor_text: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

tackle.name: tackle
tackle.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
tackle.flavor_text: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.

tail-whip.name: tail-whip
tail-whip.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.
tail-whip.effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.
tail-whip.flavor_text: The user wags its tail cutely, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Defense stats.

tailwind.name: tailwind
tailwind.short_effect: For three turns, friendly Pokémon have doubled Speed.
tailwind.effect: For the next three turns, all Pokémon on the user’s side of the field have their original Speed doubled. This effect remains if the user leaves the field.
tailwind.flavor_text: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that boosts the Speed stats of itself and its allies for four turns.

take-down.name: take-down
take-down.short_effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
take-down.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User takes 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
take-down.flavor_text: A reckless full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. This also damages the user a little.

taunt.name: taunt
taunt.short_effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.
taunt.effect: Target is forced to only use damaging moves for the next 3–5 turns, selected at random. Moves that select other moves not known in advance do not count as damaging. assist, copycat, me first, metronome, mirror move, and sleep talk do not directly inflict damage and thus may not be used. bide, counter, endeavor, metal burst, and mirror coat are allowed.
taunt.flavor_text: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

tearful-look.name: tearful-look
tearful-look.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.
tearful-look.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.
tearful-look.flavor_text: The user gets teary-eyed to make the target lose its combative spirit. This lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

teleport.name: teleport
teleport.short_effect: Immediately ends wild battles. No effect otherwise.
teleport.effect: Does nothing. Wild battles end immediately.
teleport.flavor_text: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting, if any. If a wild Pokémon uses this move, it flees.

tera-blast.name: tera-blast
tera-blast.flavor_text: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

thief.name: thief
thief.effect: Inflicts regular damage. If the target is holding an item and the user is not, the user will permanently take the item. Damage is still inflicted if an item cannot be taken. Pokémon with sticky hold or multitype are immune to the item theft effect. The target cannot recover its item with recycle. This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
thief.flavor_text: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.

thrash.name: thrash
thrash.short_effect: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
thrash.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random. After the last hit, the user becomes confused. safeguard does not protect against the confusion from this move.
thrash.flavor_text: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

thunder.name: thunder
thunder.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
thunder.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target. During rain dance, this move has 100% accuracy. It also has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection of protect and detect. During sunny day, this move has 50% accuracy.
thunder.flavor_text: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

thunder-punch.name: thunder-punch
thunder-punch.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
thunder-punch.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
thunder-punch.flavor_text: The target is attacked with an electrified punch. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

thunder-shock.name: thunder-shock
thunder-shock.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
thunder-shock.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
thunder-shock.flavor_text: The user attacks the target with a jolt of electricity. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

thunder-wave.name: thunder-wave
thunder-wave.flavor_text: The user launches a weak jolt of electricity that paralyzes the target.

thunderbolt.name: thunderbolt
thunderbolt.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
thunderbolt.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
thunderbolt.flavor_text: The user attacks the target with a strong electric blast. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

torment.name: torment
torment.short_effect: Prevents the target from using the same move twice in a row.
torment.effect: Prevents the target from attempting to use the same move twice in a row. When the target leaves the field, this effect ends. If the target is forced to attempt a repeated move due to choice band, choice scarf, choice specs, disable, encore, taunt, only having PP remaining for one move, or any other effect, the target will use struggle instead. The target is then free to use the forced move next turn, as it didn’t use that move this turn.
torment.flavor_text: The user torments and enrages the target, making it incapable of using the same move twice in a row.

toxic.name: toxic
toxic.short_effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.
toxic.effect: Badly poisons the target. Never misses when used by a poison-type Pokémon.
toxic.flavor_text: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

transform.name: transform
transform.short_effect: User becomes a copy of the target until it leaves battle.
transform.effect: User copies the target’s species, weight, type, ability, calculated stats (except HP), and moves. Copied moves will all have 5 PP remaining. IVs are copied for the purposes of hidden power, but stats are not recalculated. choice band, choice scarf, and choice specs stay in effect, and the user must select a new move. This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor forced by encore.
transform.flavor_text: The user transforms into a copy of the target, right down to having the same move set.

tri-attack.name: tri-attack
tri-attack.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.
tri-attack.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target. One of these effects is selected at random; they do not each have independent chances to occur.
tri-attack.flavor_text: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

trick.name: trick
trick.effect: User and target permanently swap held items. Works even if one of the Pokémon isn’t holding anything. If either Pokémon is holding mail, this move will fail. If either Pokémon has multitype or sticky hold, this move will fail. If this move results in a Pokémon obtaining choice band, choice scarf, or choice specs, and that Pokémon was the latter of the pair to move this turn, then the move it used this turn becomes its chosen forced move. This applies even if both Pokémon had a choice item before this move was used. If the first of the two Pokémon gains a choice item, it may select whatever choice move it wishes next turn. Neither the user nor the target can recover its item with recycle. This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
trick.flavor_text: The user catches the target off guard and swaps the target's held item with its own.

triple-kick.name: triple-kick
triple-kick.short_effect: Hits three times, increasing power by 100% with each successful hit.
triple-kick.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Hits three times in the same turn. The second hit has double power, and the third hit has triple power. Each hit has a separate accuracy check, and this move stops if a hit misses. skill link does not apply.
triple-kick.flavor_text: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successful hit.

twineedle.name: twineedle
twineedle.short_effect: Hits twice in the same turn. Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
twineedle.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Hits twice in the same turn. Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
twineedle.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

twister.name: twister
twister.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
twister.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to make each target flinch. If the target is under the effect of bounce, fly, or sky drop, this move will hit with double power.
twister.flavor_text: The user whips up a vicious tornado to tear at opposing Pokémon. This may also make them flinch.

u-turn.name: u-turn
u-turn.short_effect: User must switch out after attacking.
u-turn.effect: Inflicts regular damage, then the user immediately switches out, and the trainer selects a replacement Pokémon from the party. If the target faints from this attack, the user’s trainer selects the new Pokémon to send out first. If the user is the last Pokémon in its party that can battle, it will not switch out. The user may be hit by pursuit when it switches out, if it has been targeted and pursuit has not yet been used. This move may be used even if the user is under the effect of ingrain. ingrain’s effect will end.
u-turn.flavor_text: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

uproar.name: uproar
uproar.short_effect: Forced to use this move for several turns. Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.
uproar.effect: Inflicts regular damage. User is forced to use this move for 2–5 turns, selected at random. All Pokémon on the field wake up, and none can fall to sleep until the lock-in ends. Pokémon cannot use rest during this effect. This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
uproar.flavor_text: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.

vice-grip.name: vice-grip
vice-grip.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
vice-grip.flavor_text: The target is gripped and squeezed from both sides to inflict damage.

vine-whip.name: vine-whip
vine-whip.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
vine-whip.flavor_text: The target is struck with slender, whiplike vines to inflict damage.

water-gun.name: water-gun
water-gun.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
water-gun.flavor_text: The target is blasted with a forceful shot of water.

waterfall.name: waterfall
waterfall.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
waterfall.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
waterfall.flavor_text: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch.

weather-ball.name: weather-ball
weather-ball.short_effect: If there be weather, this move has doubled power and the weather’s type.
weather-ball.effect: Inflicts regular damage. If a weather move is active, this move has double power, and its type becomes the type of the weather move. shadow sky is typeless for the purposes of this move.
weather-ball.flavor_text: This move's type and power change depending on the weather at the time the move is used.

whirlpool.name: whirlpool
whirlpool.short_effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle and inflicts 1/16 its max HP in damage for 2-5 turns.
whirlpool.effect: Inflicts regular damage. For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn. The user continues to use other moves during this time. If the user leaves the field, this effect ends. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use. If the target is in the first turn of dive, this move will hit with double power.
whirlpool.flavor_text: The user traps the target inside a violent, swirling whirlpool that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

whirlwind.name: whirlwind
whirlwind.short_effect: Immediately ends wild battles. Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.
whirlwind.effect: Switches the target out for another of its trainer’s Pokémon selected at random. Wild battles end immediately. Doesn’t affect Pokémon with suction cups or under the effect of ingrain.
whirlwind.flavor_text: The target is blown away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

will-o-wisp.name: will-o-wisp
will-o-wisp.flavor_text: The user shoots a sinister flame at the target to inflict a burn.

wing-attack.name: wing-attack
wing-attack.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
wing-attack.flavor_text: The target is struck with large, imposing wings spread wide to inflict damage.

withdraw.name: withdraw
withdraw.short_effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.
withdraw.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.
withdraw.flavor_text: The user withdraws its body into its hard shell, boosting its Defense stat.

wrap.name: wrap
wrap.short_effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
wrap.effect: Inflicts regular damage. For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn. The user continues to use other moves during this time. If the user leaves the field, this effect ends. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use. rapid spin cancels this effect.
wrap.flavor_text: A long body, vines, or the like are used to wrap and squeeze the target for four to five turns.

zap-cannon.name: zap-cannon
zap-cannon.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
zap-cannon.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
zap-cannon.flavor_text: The user attacks by firing an electric blast like a cannon. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

zen-headbutt.name: zen-headbutt
zen-headbutt.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
zen-headbutt.effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
zen-headbutt.flavor_text: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.
